title: gonocarpus nodulosus
intro: Gonocarpus nodulosus, also known as the nodulous cord-plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australia and New Zealand, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gonocarpus nodulosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or poultices, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
